Rarity: RARE Empyrean March Fugitive Boots Evasion: 155 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 44 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9333 Unique ID: 4be9118182feb988fca331b5fb5a280743686254a74a923395b75bf6320f7ad8 Hunter Item Redeemer Item Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-R LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 1 +17% to Chaos Resistance +48% to Lightning Resistance 30% increased Movement Speed 26% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill 20% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike 7% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed while you have Onslaught 10% increased Elusive Effect 25% increased Effect of Tailwind on you You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently {crafted}+70 to maximum Life
